title: lithospermum humifusum
intro: Lithospermum humifusum, also known as blue forget-me-not or creeping lithospermum, is a low-growing, flowering plant in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum humifusum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic to combat infections. Lithospermum humifusum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
